bench_setup.notes: CRC hardware unit self-test. CRC (AHB4, 0x58024C00, CRCEN=RCC_AHB4ENR bit19). Default config: CRC-32/MPEG-2 poly=0x04C11DB7, INIT=0xFFFFFFFF, 32-bit input. Tests: (1) same input gives same result, (2) different input gives different result, (3) RESET restores INIT=0xFFFFFFFF. On PASS: detail0=CRC of {0x12345678,0xABCDEF01,0xDEADBEEF}. On FAIL: 0xE001=result mismatch on repeat, 0xE002=collision (different input same CRC), 0xE003=RESET value wrong. No loopback wiring required.
